feature.name: CSS anchor positioning with transforms
feature.creator: mstensho@chromium.org
feature.summary: When an anchor-positioned element is tethered against an anchor that has a transform (or is contained by something with a transform), resolve anchor() and anchor-size() functions against the bounding box of the transformed anchor.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2025-09-30 by mstensho@chromium.org). When an anchor-positioned element is tethered against an anchor that has a transform (or is contained by something with a transform), resolve anchor() and anchor-size() functions against the bounding box of the transformed anchor. Category: CSS. Blink component: Blink>Layout. Stars: 70.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.

incubation.finding: Feature targets web feature 'anchor-positioning'. This is an official WebDX feature. Problem definition depends on the spec/explainer which was not directly accessible.
incubation.limitations: No public explainer or incubation discussion accessible.

wideReview.finding: Feature maps to official WebDX feature 'anchor-positioning'. Cross-engine positions not verified in this report.

adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'AnchorPositioning' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 97) measured 4.8593% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2024-08-10 with 573 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the AnchorPositioning family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 144 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
